sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id INTEGER, data MAP<STRING, INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO test_map VALUES (1, MAP {'key1': 10, 'key2': 20}), (2, MAP {'key1': 15, 'key3': 25});
UPDATE test_map SET data = MAP {'key2': 20, 'key4': 30} WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_map WHERE map_contains_entry(data, 'key2', 20);
SELECT id FROM test_map WHERE map_contains_entry(data, 'key1', 10) OR map_contains_entry(data, 'key3', 25);
